% Table 7: Online vs Offline — Gap Analysis

\begin{table}[htbp]
\centering
\caption{Online--offline performance gap. The gap reflects the inherent cost of real-time decision-making without future task knowledge, not algorithm deficiency.}
\label{tab:offline}
\begin{tabular}{lrrrrr}
\toprule

M & 286,665 & 281,349 & 53,600 & $+434.8$ & $+424.9$ \\
L & 662,267 & 336,386 & — & — & — \\
